title: Doctoral Researcher
summary: Georg-August-Universität Göttingen, Institut für Materialphysik (May 2018 - Oct 2021)
bullets: Modeled atomic-scale friction systems using Python and C on HLRN HPC clusters.
Improved computational efficiency by 10% via constraint monitoring and automated cleanup.
Reduced memory usage by 60% through optimized data structures and on-the-fly processing.
